description: Implement folder organization and tagging system for contract dashboard. Database schema (contract_folders, contract_tags, contract_tag_assignments), folder sidebar UI, tag management, API routes, and dashboard integration.
reviewNotes: Code complete. Git corruption recovery required manual commit via fresh clone. All 5 UI components + 4 API routes + updated contracts API committed.

task: Seed system templates and workspace cleanup
description: Load 9 pre-generated templates from generated-templates/ into contract_templates table. Remove duplicate files. Make template library functional.
reviewNotes: Solid implementation. Well-structured seed script with proper TypeScript types, error handling, and graceful duplicate checking. Added npm seed:templates command. Both duplicate files removed (commit message only mentioned one, but both were deleted). Zero TypeScript errors. All acceptance criteria met.

task: Complete streaming contract generation with SSE
description: Finish the partially-built streaming contract generation feature. SSE endpoint + frontend overlay + progressive UI updates as clauses generate.
reviewNotes: Solid implementation. Added 1122 lines across 4 files (SSE route, streaming generator lib, overlay updates, page integration). All spec requirements met. Pre-existing TS error in unrelated file (contracts/[id]/page.ts) not caused by this task. Non-streaming generator preserved as fallback. Clean commit message. Cannot verify runtime behavior without manual testing but code structure looks correct.
Verified: ContractPaywall.tsx displays '$19.99/mo' in upgrade CTA. Correct.

description: Convert GBP (£) to USD ($), update Pro/Business prices
reviewNotes: Verified: docs/MONETIZATION.md shows Pro at $19.99/month USD throughout. Currency conversion complete.

task: Fix Pricing in PRD.md Appendix B
reviewNotes: Verified: PRD.md pricing table shows Pro $19.99/mo and Business $39.99/mo. Correct.

description: Change contractsPerMonth from 2 to 3 in rate-limits.ts and tests
reviewNotes: Verified: rate-limits.ts free.contractsPerMonth is 3. Helper functions (isLimitExceeded, getRemainingQuota, etc.) all reference TIER_LIMITS correctly.

description: Implement reset-on-read pattern for usage counters in subscription API
reviewNotes: Verified pre-existing: checkAndResetUsage function in subscription/route.ts implements reset-on-read pattern correctly. No new code needed.

description: Add disclaimer to PDF generation and editor view
reviewNotes: Verified: AIDisclaimer component at components/contracts/AIDisclaimer.tsx with AlertTriangle icon, amber styling, professional legal language. PDF disclaimer pre-existing in pdf/route.ts. Component imported in edit/page.tsx.
Verified: only generator-streaming.ts exists in contracts/ lib. Duplicate removed.

Excellent: STRIPE_WEBHOOKS.md documents both webhook endpoints with complete event tables, file paths, env vars, overlap warning (checkout.session.completed handled by both), and local testing instructions with Stripe CLI. Production-ready documentation.

description: Create SENTRY_SETUP.md checklist for human to complete
reviewNotes: Verified: SENTRY_SETUP.md has clear 7-step checklist. Documents what's already configured (client replay, server/edge sampling, tunnel route). Actionable for human.

task: Add Basic E2E Tests with Playwright
description: Create Playwright config and test files for auth and contract flows
reviewNotes: Retry successful: @playwright/test@1.58.2 added as devDependency. All 14 Playwright TS errors resolved. Only remaining TS error is pre-existing Next.js async params issue in .next/types/ (unrelated). Clean commit — 1 line in package.json + lockfile update.

description: Add sendWelcomeEmail function and trigger in auth callback
reviewNotes: Verified pre-existing: sendWelcomeEmail in email.ts, triggered in auth/callback/route.ts. No new code needed.

description: Add metadata to login, register, about, contact pages
reviewNotes: Verified: All 4 pages have metadata. Login/register export metadata directly (server components). About/contact correctly use layout.tsx files for metadata since pages are 'use client'. Proper titles and descriptions throughout.

description: Verify legal pages have substantive content
reviewNotes: Verified pre-existing: /terms and /privacy have comprehensive legal content covering ESIGN Act, GDPR, etc. E2E tests also validate this content exists.

description: Create DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md with pre/post deployment steps
reviewNotes: Excellent: Comprehensive deployment checklist covering all env vars (Supabase, AI, Stripe, Email, Analytics, App), Stripe setup steps, DNS/SSL, Supabase config, email verification, post-deployment verification (11 checks), and 48-hour monitoring plan. Production-ready.
